plugins.name: caveman-autostart
plugins.description: Automatically enables caveman's ultra-compressed communication mode at session start via a SessionStart hook that injects the vendored ruleset directly

plugins.name: protected-paths
plugins.description: Blocks tool calls from reading or writing credential and config directories (SSH keys, cloud credentials, kube/docker configs) via a PreToolUse hook

plugins.name: schema-converter
plugins.description: Convert JSON schemas to other formats (Go structs, TypeScript interfaces, etc.)
